decisions.decision: music_plan.source = none — DEFAULT for news-narrative pipeline

decisions.subject: Composition runtime for documentary montage

options_considered.label: Remotion (React-based)
options_considered.reason: React scene component stack: text cards, Ken Burns on stills, spring transitions, subtitle burn-in. Purpose-built for this documentary style.

options_considered.label: HyperFrames (HTML/CSS/GSAP)
options_considered.reason: Best for kinetic typography and product promos; lacks Remotion's text_card and scene-type stack
options_considered.rejected_because: No text_card scene type; less natural fit for narration-driven documentary

options_considered.label: FFmpeg (Ken Burns only)
options_considered.reason: Only supports Ken Burns pan-and-zoom; cannot render animated text cards or spring transitions
options_considered.rejected_because: Insufficient for animated text cards and scene composition required by this piece

decisions.reason: The piece requires animated text cards (golden-line moments), Ken Burns on AI-generated stills, and spring-physics transitions for emotional pacing. Remotion's scene component stack is purpose-built for this.

decisions.subject: Background music for news narrative

options_considered.label: No music (pipeline DEFAULT)
options_considered.reason: News-narrative pipeline defaults to voice-only. Narration IS the audio. No music keeps the focus on the human voice and the weight of the words.

decisions.reason: 新闻叙事 — 人声驱动，不需要背景音乐。The narration IS the audio. Adding music would distract from the voice-forward documentary style.
